title: The Shape of Suffering
subtitle: A Study of Dependent Co-arising
pageTitle: The Shape of Suffering: A Study of Dependent Co-arising
author: Thanissaro Bhikkhu
summary: In this book the author examines the nature of dependent co-arising (paticca samuppada) — the complex causal structure by which dukkha arises and ceases. It also shows how the factors of the path address the causes of suffering in a way that leads to its cessation.
